jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Vijaya Diagnostics
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
